mapper.select:
SELECT u.id, u.user_id, u.username, u.branch_id, u.branch_name, u.notes_id, u.last_login_time, u.status, u.create_time, u.create_by, u.update_time, u.update_by, u.deleted FROM sys_user u WHERE u.deleted = 0
AND (u.user_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{dto.keyword}, '%') OR u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{dto.keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY u.create_time DESC
